title: Lists, Tuples, Ranges, and Comprehensions · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Model and transform ordered service records while preserving aliasing and order requirements. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for an ordered service-record processor after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create, update, search, append, extend, insert, remove, and clear lists with explicit mutation intent.
Use positive and negative indexing, slicing, strides, and bounds behavior without losing required elements.
Distinguish aliasing, shallow copy, nested mutable sharing, and deliberate independent copies.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
